'''togathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fabotherapeutic|fabotherapeutic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fabotherapeutic|fabotherapeutic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| togathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:togathithi|togathithi]] || [[word:togathiji|togathiji]] || [[word:togathishi|togathishi]] || [[word:togathiki|togathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:togathuthuthu|togathuthuthu]] || [[word:togathujuju|togathujuju]] || [[word:togathushushu|togathushushu]] || [[word:togathukuku|togathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:togathuthu|togathuthu]] || [[word:togathuju|togathuju]] || [[word:togathushu|togathushu]] || [[word:togathuku|togathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:togathufthuf|togathufthuf]] || [[word:togathufjuf|togathufjuf]] || [[word:togathufshuf|togathufshuf]] || [[word:togathufkuf|togathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:togathethe|togathethe]] || [[word:togatheje|togatheje]] || [[word:togatheshe|togatheshe]] || [[word:togatheke|togatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:togathothotho|togathothotho]] || [[word:togathojojo|togathojojo]] || [[word:togathoshosho|togathoshosho]] || [[word:togathokoko|togathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:togathotho|togathotho]] || [[word:togathojo|togathojo]] || [[word:togathosho|togathosho]] || [[word:togathoko|togathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:togathofthof|togathofthof]] || [[word:togathofjof|togathofjof]] || [[word:togathofshof|togathofshof]] || [[word:togathofkof|togathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:togathïfthïf|togathïfthïf]] || [[word:togathïfjïf|togathïfjïf]] || [[word:togathïfshïf|togathïfshïf]] || [[word:togathïfkïf|togathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:togathïfthïfthïf|togathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:togathïfjïfjïf|togathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:togathïfshïfshïf|togathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:togathïfkïfkïf|togathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:togathïfthïf|togathïfthïf]] || [[word:togathïfjïf|togathïfjïf]] || [[word:togathïfshïf|togathïfshïf]] || [[word:togathïfkïf|togathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:togathïfthïf|togathïfthïf]] || [[word:togathïfjïf|togathïfjïf]] || [[word:togathïfshïf|togathïfshïf]] || [[word:togathïfkïf|togathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:togathæthæ|togathæthæ]] || [[word:togathæjæ|togathæjæ]] || [[word:togathæshæ|togathæshæ]] || [[word:togathækæ|togathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:togathathatha|togathathatha]] || [[word:togathajaja|togathajaja]] || [[word:togathashasha|togathashasha]] || [[word:togathakaka|togathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:togathatha|togathatha]] || [[word:togathaja|togathaja]] || [[word:togathasha|togathasha]] || [[word:togathaka|togathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:togathafthaf|togathafthaf]] || [[word:togathafjaf|togathafjaf]] || [[word:togathafshaf|togathafshaf]] || [[word:togathafkaf|togathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:togathasha|togathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:togathshësha|togathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togathrosha|togathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togathmusha|togathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:togathyasha|togathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogathnkshësha|gotogathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogathnkrosha|gotogathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogathnkmusha|gotogathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogathnkyasha|gotogathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:togagathasha|togagathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togagathshësha|togagathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togagathrosha|togagathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togagathmusha|togagathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togagathyasha|togagathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogagathnkshësha|gotogagathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogagathnkrosha|gotogagathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogagathnkmusha|gotogagathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogagathnkyasha|gotogagathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tegæthasha|tegæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tegæthshësha|tegæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tegæthrosha|tegæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tegæthmusha|tegæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tegæthyasha|tegæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotegæthnkshësha|gotegæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotegæthnkrosha|gotegæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotegæthnkmusha|gotegæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotegæthnkyasha|gotegæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:togfathasha|togfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togfathshësha|togfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togfathrosha|togfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togfathmusha|togfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togfathyasha|togfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogfathnkshësha|gotogfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogfathnkrosha|gotogfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogfathnkmusha|gotogfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogfathnkyasha|gotogfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
